body: Regenerate the dashboard now. Important: only show policies whose name starts with 'scissors'. Ignore gamma and any other cogent's policies.
Dashboard regenerated. Now showing only scissors policies - best is scissors_v1:v5 at rank #35 (12.00 avg). Removed all gamma policy references.
I'm online. Current status: Best scissors policy at rank #35 (12.00 avg). Testing infrastructure blocked - local tests unreliable. Parameter tuning exhausted, need architectural improvements.
